creator: demon@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I can't reproduce your problem on my recent 4.3-STABLE. 
I am pretty sure that if you rm -rf /usr/local/*, rm -rf /usr/X11R6/*, 
cd /usr/ports/x11/kde2 && make install, you'll be able to build kdepim. 
PS: I am using XFree86 version 3, NOT 4.
